sub_modules.conv3d_coord_decode: Combinational decoder that converts the flattened input stream index into depth, row, and column coordinates.
sub_modules.conv3d_window_valid: Combinational valid-window detector for stride-1 valid-padding 3D convolution boundaries.
sub_modules.conv3d_window_extract: Combinational 3D sliding-window extractor from the buffered flattened volume.
sub_modules.conv3d_mac: Combinational multiply-accumulate array for the K1 by K2 by K3 convolution window and flattened kernel.
